label: ntp-monitor
user_data:
#cloud-config
package_update: true
packages:
  - golang
runcmd:
  - mkdir -p /opt/ntp-monitor
  - cd /opt/ntp-monitor
  - wget https://your.domain.com/releases/ntp-logger.tar.gz
  - tar -xzvf ntp-logger.tar.gz
  - cd ntp-logger/cmd/ntp-monitor
  - go build -o ntp-monitor
  - |
    cat <<EOF > /etc/systemd/system/ntp-monitor.service
    [Unit]
    Description=NTP Monitor
    [Service]
    ExecStart=/opt/ntp-monitor/ntp-logger/cmd/ntp-monitor/ntp-monitor
    Restart=always
    [Install]
    WantedBy=multi-user.target
    EOF
  - systemctl daemon-reexec
  - systemctl enable ntp-monitor
  - systemctl start ntp-monitor
